visual_findings: Reference-intent scoring improved dimension selection and distribution compared with the prior generic AutoDimension layout.
The angled hole/radius/thread callout stack still overlaps the top view and is not drafter-acceptable.
The staged CAD worker failed after generation because legacy quality_check hit SolidWorks OpenDoc6 RPC failure, so this case remains need_review/fail and not deliverable.
cases.required_next_action: Move hole/radius/thread callouts into a protected leader lane outside the top-view box and rerun 006 staged CAD plus application UI screenshot review.

acceptance_rule: Application UI screenshot visual PASS is required before any drawing can be accepted.
